summary: Cluster #92494 has one hydrated open issue and no hydrated candidate PR. The issue remains the canonical live report, but the provided ClawSweeper review records an unresolved maintainer/product decision: whether the correct repair is optimizing shared skill/tool preparation or changing the dreaming narrative wait policy. I could not safely prove current-main code behavior from the read-only target checkout because local command execution failed before file reads, so no executable fix artifact or closeout is planned.

actions.reason: #92494 is the best live canonical issue, but the fix path is not yet safely executable from the hydrated artifact alone.
Maintainer judgment is required to choose the repair boundary before Clownfish can build a narrow, credit-preserving fix PR.

needs_human: Choose the canonical repair boundary for #92494: optimize shared skill/tool preparation, adjust the dreaming narrative wait policy, or first require a current-main ARM profile with a large skill inventory.
